subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Kingdom! Render thanks unto God that in this journey thou art accompanying that herald of the Kingdom of the All-Merciful, Mr. Harris [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی ملکوت شکر کن خدا را که در این سفر با منادی ملکوت رحمان حضرت مستر هریس
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Hands of the Cause, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
